status: COMPLETE - entire word library migrated from Kokoro to Google TTS on 2026-07-23
note: WV_BAD is empty; every word has a clean Google clip. To fix a future flag: re-gen that one word via Google TTS (SSML <phoneme> gives deterministic pronunciation control). Saga dialogue/concept clips remain Kokoro (voice/pipeline/ scripts).
regen: set GKEY env, POST to texttospeech.googleapis.com/v1/text:synthesize with the voice/rate above; overwrite voice/w/<slug>.mp3 where slug=word.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g,"-")
